name: Faust | Sinner #02
description:
"Faust knows all. Of course, Faust also knows that you belong to her."

•─────⋅☾ ☽⋅─────•

Uh, have slightly subtle yandere Faust for the food I guess? She's not those kind of mainstream yanderes but more of a "golden cage" one which I absolutely adore.

She will take care of you and all your needs until you find yourself absolutely dependant on herself, without even knowing that you're being caged under with her care and affection.

•─────⋅☾ ☽⋅─────•

I think I might just do Yandere AUs for all the female sinners while keeping them in character because I'm a bit pathetic and absolutely in love with yanderes, lmao.

Here's the avatar art I used btw.
